UpdateTrigger.eventTypes: List of trigger events. Valid values: UPLOAD_CHART (Helm Chart push), DOWNLOAD_CHART (Helm Chart pull), DELETE_CHART (Helm Chart delete), PUSH_ARTIFACT (artifact push), PULL_ARTIFACT (artifact pull), DELETE_ARTIFACT (artifact delete)
UpdateTrigger.filters.value: Value corresponding to the filter type
UpdateTrigger.name: Trigger name
UpdateTrigger.targets.address: URL to be called when the trigger is fired
UpdateTrigger.targets.headers: Custom header information. Only `Authorization` is supported as the header key
